description: Historical archive vault for regionContractCard instances tied to real geographic and archival data. Contains concrete region cards with invariant bands derived from historical records.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All artifacts must include a valid schemaRef pointing to an approved schema.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All artifacts must include target metadata for routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All authoring requests must reference the routing spine for route resolution.

authoringHints.summary: T2-vault content repo for historical region contract instances. Focus on geographically and archivally grounded regions.
aiBehavior: Always verify schemaRef before generating region contract artifacts
Route regionContractCard T2-vault requests to this repo
Ensure all region cards reference appropriate historical data sources
